location.office_time_required: hybrid to the HelloFresh corporate office in New York City, NY

level_signals: Reports to Associate Director of Growth
Comp range $121,500–$136,700 base, consistent with mid-senior IC manager level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of experience in a fast-paced Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) business or startup, with close contact and proven success in leveraging a growth marketing engine (e.g., performance, retention, or CRM).

Strong Data Literacy & Autonomy: You are highly adept at reading and interpreting complex performance data, translating it into clear learnings and actionable next steps for growth optimization. You are also capable of autonomously driving data excellence by requesting and structuring the necessary data to inform your decisions.

Exceptional Collaboration & Accountability: Proven ability to identify growth opportunities and skillfully collaborate with cross-market Channel Managers to implement initiatives. You can easily manage implementation support while effectively keeping partners accountable to performance metrics.

Brand Growth Vision & Customer Focus: You possess a deep understanding of the customer journey and the marketing funnel. You advocate for strategies that not only make commercial sense but also drive the right customer experience to build genuine brand (re)consideration.
Eagerness to Learn & Adapt: A proactive mindset and a genuine desire to learn new channels, data techniques, and customer insights in a constantly evolving environment.

scope.surface: Referrals & Activations growth programs for Factor US brand
primary_metrics_inferred: Referral and activation program performance vs. targets
cross_functional_partners: Associate Director of Growth, Factor US
core_responsibilities: Steer RAF performance & strategy: Analyze and distill complex business insights to provide leadership with a comprehensive understanding of performance relative to targets, including a clear diagnosis of the underlying causes for any deviations.

Optimize targeting for value generation: Deeply analyze campaign performance to recommend and implement optimizations to our targeting criteria, ensuring campaigns maximize the Total Value Generated rather than simply volume.

Serve as the Local brand advocate: Act as the voice of Factor-US, socializing the CMO's local marketing strategy to global channel experts and translating high-level objectives into concrete, context-specific campaign requirements.

Enhance product messaging efficiency: Collaborate with the local Product Marketing Manager to integrate the best product-level messages into campaigns, increasing messaging efficiency and ensuring we are always targeting the right customer with the right offer.
Facilitate growth analysis and projects on Activations: Facilitate the execution of growth initiatives by working alongside the Senior Manager of Growth Strategy.

compensation.equity_form: company equity plan based on role

green_flags: Equity mentioned as part of package
Generous benefits including $0 monthly health options from day one, 16 weeks parental leave, sabbatical PTO
Clear reporting structure and cross-functional partners identified
Well-defined product surface (Referrals & Activations for Factor US)
Role scope and responsibilities are specific rather than vague
red_flags: Hybrid requirement to NYC office with no remote option, eliminating non-NYC candidates
Visa sponsorship and work authorization policy not mentioned
No explicit mention of individual contributor vs. people management responsibilities — 'Manager' title could be ambiguous
Global vs. local tension in role (local brand advocate working with global channel teams) may create influence-without-authority friction

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title, comp range, and years requirement)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and DTC mention)
ambiguities: The role title includes 'Manager' but JD does not specify whether this role manages direct reports or is a senior IC; treated as non-people-manager based on no explicit mention of team management.

The archetype sits between 'Growth PM' and 'Growth (non-PM)' — the role has PM-like ownership of a growth channel but is framed as analytics/strategy, not a traditional PM role. Classified as Growth PM with secondary note.
Eagerness to Learn is listed under 'You Have...' (the required section) but reads more like a cultural fit trait; classified as hard severity per extraction rules.
